Add 1/2 to the paladin’s level when determining the effect of smite evil against evil-aligned dragons.
Add a +1/2 bonus to Stealth and Sleight of Hand checks to steal or hide objects.
Add a +1/2 bonus to the damage of spells or spell-like abilities that deal damage of the same energy type as the sorcerer’s draconic bloodline breath weapon.
